description: Stylish and move-in ready, this South Austin home offers extensive updates and a backyard designed for entertaining. Improvements include double-pane windows, updated kitchen and bathroom cabinetry, granite countertops, flooring, stainless steel appliances, lighting, doors, ceiling fans, and more. Fresh interior paint was completed in June 2026, and the HVAC system was replaced in 2021 for added efficiency. Inside, the open floor plan is filled with natural light and anchored by a stunning fireplace that serves as the focal point of the main living area. Upstairs, you'll find three generously sized bedrooms, each featuring walk-in closets.

Thoughtfully updated for today's buyer, this single-story residence offers added peace of mind w/ a roof replaced in 2024, foundation repair completed in 2023, updated kitchen improvements, rebuilt northwest exterior wall in 2011, granite counters, stainless appliances & durable laminate flooring, creating a move-in-ready opportunity to focus on living rather than projects. Ideally positioned in North Austin's Quail Creek area, you'll enjoy convenient access to Hwy 183, Mopac, The Domain, Q2 Stadium, major employers, shopping, dining, parks & everyday essentials, while benefiting from Austin ISD schools.

Within the gated community of The Uplands—where homes are rarely offered—this property combines a private, established setting with close proximity to Bee Cave amenities, including the Hill Country Galleria, Lakeway, Lake Travis, and an easy drive into Austin. Set on just over half an acre, the homesite is defined by mature trees that create shade, privacy, and a natural sense of calm. Outdoor living includes a covered porch for everyday use and an extended open deck for dining, entertaining, or relaxing among the trees. The backyard offers space to further personalize, whether for recreation, gardening, or future enhancements.

This exceptional 3,480-square-foot Drees home is nestled on an oversized greenbelt lot in the highly sought-after Northwoods at Avery Ranch. Surrounded by majestic trees and featuring a desirable single-story layout with a 3-car tandem garage, this home offers the perfect blend of elegance, comfort, and convenience. Ideally located minutes from highly rated Round Rock ISD including Purple Sage Elementary, Pearson Ranch MS, Avery Ranch Golf Club, and the Brushy Creek Trail system, you'll enjoy easy access to both top-tier amenities and natural beauty. The stunning stone and stucco exterior and inviting curb appeal set the stage for the impressive interior. High ceilings, arched architectural details and plantation shutters.

BEST DEAL in South Austin. Turn key, large yard, no back neighbors and one bedroom could be used as a Mother-In-Law suite. Step into a home where everyday living feels effortless & inviting. Positioned in South Austin, you'll enjoy quick access to Slaughter Ln, I-35 & a variety of nearby dining, shopping, parks & daily essentials, plus zoning to Top-Tier Blazier Elementary, Paredes Middle & Akins High helps keep your routine connected. Inside, your layout creates opportunity at every turn, w/ a spacious kitchen featuring granite counters, island & pantry that flows seamlessly into your main living area—perfect for hosting or unwinding—while your large backyard invites outdoor dining, weekend gatherings or simply enjoying your own space.

Welcome to 12113 Cascade Caverns Trail in Barker Ranch at Shady Hollow, where generous living space, thoughtful updates, and an incredible Southwest Austin lifestyle come together just 20 to 25 minutes from downtown. This 5-bedroom, 3.5-bath home offers exceptional flexibility with an office, second living area, flex room, and 3-car garage, creating space for work, hosting, hobbies, and everyday comfort. The backyard feels like its own private retreat, centered around a beautiful heritage oak tree and designed for entertaining with an oversized deck, putting green, cowboy pool, xeriscaped landscaping, and storage shed.

Welcome to 1806 Krizan Ave, where every major update has already been completed so you can focus on enjoying the lifestyle that comes with living in one of North Austin's most convenient locations. Perfectly positioned across from the Wells Creek Greenbelt, this beautifully renovated home combines modern finishes, energy-efficient upgrades, and exceptional access to Austin's thriving tech corridor. Inside, you'll find a completely refreshed interior featuring new kitchen cabinetry, new hardware, designer backsplash, and new countertops in both the kitchen and bathrooms. The kitchen is equipped with a new gas range, microwave, and a refrigerator, making this home truly move-in ready.

2+ acres in Austin with a pool, guest house, and a level of privacy rarely found this close to the city. Just minutes from downtown Austin, this exceptional property offers a compelling blend of location, flexibility, and refined country living. Tucked away in a serene setting with minimal neighboring visibility, the main residence features 3 bedrooms and 2 bathrooms thoughtfully positioned to capture the beauty of the surrounding landscape. Expansive windows bathe the interiors in natural light, creating a seamless connection between the home and its inviting outdoor environment.

A quiet morning bike ride to Barton Springs, a stroll down the block to the greenbelt, and an evening two stepping at the Broken Spoke; this Barton Hills residence captures the quintessential central Austin lifestyle. Offering 4 bedrooms, 3 full bathrooms, and a thoughtfully designed single story layout, the home combines modern luxury with exceptional livability. Built by Paradisa Homes, the open floor plan is enhanced by elevated ceilings and abundant natural light. The expansive living area flows seamlessly into a chef's kitchen featuring Thermador appliances, custom cabinetry, and quartz countertops.

Tucked inside a gated lock-and-leave community built by Pulte in 2016, this remarkable two-story residence delivers an interior that feels more custom showpiece than suburban home. From the moment you step inside, the level of design and craftsmanship is impossible to ignore. Natural quartzite countertops with a dramatic waterfall edge, Zellige Moroccan tile, statement lighting, custom ceiling-height cabinetry, designer fixtures, and meticulously curated finishes create a look rarely found at this price point. The gourmet kitchen anchors the home with premium stainless appliances, gas cooking, custom pantry storage, and an oversized island that connects the home chef to the dining and living spaces.

Space, freedom, and unmatched versatility—this is Hill Country living on your terms. Set on 3.4 acres in the highly sought-after Smokey Mountain Oaks community, this exceptional property offers a rare opportunity to own usable land paired with incredible improvements—perfect for those who need room to live, work, create, and entertain. The grounds are thoughtfully laid out to maximize both function and lifestyle. A standout feature is the impressive 40x50 workshop, offering endless possibilities for business use, hobbies, or storage. Complementing this is a 30x40 covered parking structure, ideal for RVs, equipment, or recreational vehicles.

11901 North Oaks Drive is proof that affordable homes don't have to sacrifice character. Set on a generous 0.2768-acre lot beneath a canopy of heritage Live Oak trees, this extensively updated 3-bedroom, 1.5-bath home offers 1,295 square feet of thoughtfully designed living space with outdoor room to spare. Real hardwood floors, beamed ceilings and abundant natural light bring warmth and personality throughout the home. The floor plan lives comfortably beyond its square footage, with inviting gathering spaces, a dedicated dining area, and a primary bedroom featuring the luxury of two closets. Several rooms enjoy peaceful views of the backyard, bringing the outdoors into everyday life.

This immaculate 5-bedroom Avana home showcases one of the best layouts in SW Austin, offering a rare dual primary suite design that balances grand-scale entertaining with quiet, everyday luxury. Meticulously maintained and rich with character, this two-story property instantly feels special, greeting you with wood flooring, warm natural light, and an undeniable sense of quality. In the main living room, soaring two-story ceilings and sliding glass doors look out into the yard, while a corner fireplace anchors the space with warmth. Positioned perfectly for dinner parties, the formal dining room sits between the living area and a stunning gourmet kitchen.

This charming one story home has 4 beds, 2 baths with an open living room and kitchen, and is ready for your renovations. Located on 0.335 acres with a large attached garage, you can enjoy the big private back yard with a screened in back porch and small storage shed. Mature trees on site and a great location for commuting and day trips. The neighborhood has low restrictions with many rented out properties. The home is cared for and in good condition, but is in need of re-leveling from foundation movement. Investors are welcomed to submit their written offers. Tenant is a family member with a month to month rental agreement. Please schedule showings and contractor walk-throughs via Showingtime.

Open House: Saturday 6/20 1pm-3pm. Poised for its next chapter in one of South Austin's most beloved pockets, this exceptional property captures everything that makes Castlewood Forest so enduringly desirable. Situated on nearly half an acre, among the largest lot offerings available in the neighborhood, 8809 Collingwood presents a rare blend of space, privacy, and lifestyle-driven amenities that are increasingly difficult to find in close-in South Austin. Designed for both everyday enjoyment and unforgettable entertaining, the outdoor experience truly sets this home apart. A stunning pool anchors the backyard retreat, while an expansive recreation space offers incredible flexibility.

Completely remodeled from top to bottom, this beautifully updated Colony Park home offers the perfect blend of modern upgrades and East Austin convenience. Major improvements include a new roof, durable cement siding, and extensive interior renovations that make the home truly move-in ready. Inside, you'll find a thoughtfully redesigned interior featuring updated finishes, a refreshed kitchen and bathrooms, and a bright, welcoming layout designed for comfortable everyday living. Every detail has been carefully considered to create a home that feels both stylish and functional.

3606 Abbate Circle is the kind of older East Austin home people fall for and decide to keep. Built in 1950, it sits on a big SF3 lot in Govalle, about four miles from downtown, with original hardwood floors, real character, and a backyard built for hanging out. A covered front porch looks over a deep lawn planted with agave and prickly pear. Inside, the plan is open, bright, and flexible. The living and dining area runs into a renovated kitchen with butcher block counters, white shaker cabinets, a farmhouse apron sink, blue-green tile, open wood shelving, a gas range, and stainless appliances.

Thoughtfully updated and well-maintained, this Windsor Park-area home welcomes you with a modern front entry, flexible living spaces, and a long list of upgrades designed for comfort and peace of mind. Inside, vaulted ceilings and abundant natural light highlight the spacious step-down living room, anchored by a painted brick fireplace. A versatile front room with French doors provides the perfect space for a home office or second living area. The kitchen features Silestone countertops, stainless appliances, double ovens, gas cooktop, and a breakfast area with backyard views.

Born in 1939 and better than ever, this Hyde Park/Hancock bungalow serves up vintage Austin charm, modern updates, and a location that does all the bragging for it. At 1,261 sq ft of light-drenched, large-windowed bungalow bliss plus a 400 sq ft ADU finished in 2023, this property is equal parts soul and strategy. The main house serves up 3 bedrooms and 2 full bathrooms, a renovated kitchen and hardwood floors. Step outside and you've got a front yard made for sitting under the trees and a back deck built for entertaining. There's also a driveway and garage, which in central Austin is practically a luxury amenity.

Built in 2003, this Clarksville single-family home on a corner lot captures the craftsman charm of the neighborhood with hardwood floors, built-in bookcases, and a light-filled sunroom perfect for watching the birds. The open-concept living, dining, and kitchen area feels both airy and inviting, with natural light pouring in from the oversized windows. The spacious primary suite features a large walk-in closet, a private balcony with views of downtown, and an ensuite bath. Two additional bedrooms on the main floor share a full hall bath. Downstairs, a bonus room with HVAC offers flexible space for a home office, gym, craft room.

Fully renovated and move-in ready, this beautifully updated Northwest Hills home offers nearly 3,000 square feet of thoughtfully designed living space, exceptional privacy, and a resort-style backyard retreat. Set among mature trees on a quiet bluff lot, the property enjoys peaceful treetop views and a unique sense of seclusion rarely found this close to the city. Extensively improved over the past year, the home features a new roof, recently replastered pool, fully remodeled primary bath, updated secondary bath, and numerous additional upgrades that allow buyers to move in and immediately enjoy the home.

Welcome to 6106 Yellow Rose Cv, a rare opportunity to own a beautifully situated home in one of Austin's most desirable and established neighborhoods. Located in the highly sought-after Westcreek neighborhood, this property offers the perfect blend of timeless charm, everyday comfort, and unbeatable convenience. Surrounded by mature trees and classic Oak Hill character, the home delivers a peaceful residential setting while remaining just minutes from the vibrant energy of downtown Austin, local dining, shopping, entertainment, and highly rated schools.

Versatile Rosedale Charmer with prime location, investment potential, and top schools. Welcome to 1105 W 43rd Street, a beautifully maintained 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom bungalow in the heart of Rosedale, one of Austin's most sought-after and walkable neighborhoods. Whether you're looking for a forever home, a smart investment, or a central Austin retreat, this property offers it all. Filled with warmth and natural light, this home has a flexible floor plan with gorgeous Acacia hardwood floors, updated fixtures, and a blend of vintage character and modern comfort.

This one story South Austin gem has all the character you're looking for with beamed ceilings, a brick fireplace, a sunroom perfect for a home office or flex space, and a spacious primary suite with private ensuite bath. All kitchen appliances convey. No HOA and a fenced backyard! Needs a little TLC, but the bones are great and the opportunity is real. Located in the heart of South Austin with easy access to I-35, US-290, and TX-1. Minutes from the St. Elmo Entertainment District, Battle Bend Park, local dining, and shopping.

Unbeatable opportunity in the heart of Southeast Austin! Situated on a generous lot, this 3 bedroom, 2 bath home offers endless potential for investors, flippers, or buyers looking to add value through renovation. Whether you're seeking your next fix and flip project, rental property, or long-term investment, this property presents a rare chance to capitalize on a prime Austin location. The functional floor plan and expansive lot provide a strong foundation for updates and improvements, while the property's convenient location enhances its appeal.

This beautifully maintained 3-bedroom, 2.5-bath home sits on a scenic greenbelt lot and features fresh interior and exterior paint, a new roof, and upgraded new carpet upstairs. Offering comfort, convenience, and exceptional value, the property also includes a rare 3.25% assumable loan through Rocket Mortgage (contact listing agent for details). Thoughtfully designed for everyday living, the home features a versatile loft space ideal for a home office, media room, or play area, along with a spacious primary suite complete with a private ensuite bath.

Stunning Greenbelt Home in Highly Sought-After Canyon Creek! Impeccably maintained and beautifully updated throughout, this 4-bedroom, 3-bath home offers the perfect blend of luxury, comfort, and timeless style. Nestled on a scenic greenbelt lot, the home features warm hardwood floors throughout most living areas, with carpet reserved for the bedrooms. A grand foyer welcomes you into spacious formal living and dining rooms, while the inviting family room showcases a fireplace and views of the private backyard and greenbelt beyond.
